projects.name: OxyJen
projects.description: OxyJen is an open-source Java framework for orchestrating LLM workloads with graph-style execution, context-aware memory, and deterministic retry/fallback. It treats LLMs as native nodes (not helper utilities), allowing developers to build multi-step AI pipelines that integrate cleanly with existing Java code.
